pw_msg_notravel: An item prevents you from travelling
pw_msg_travel_inside: The flight will start after exiting. Waiting $1
pw_ward_offering_surtlingcore_descriptio: feed the old flame within the ward to mend damaged structures in all connected areas
pw_ward_offering_blackcore_description: set a black core at the ward and let its buried power harden nearby structures
pw_ward_offering_food_description: share food with the ward to call a gentle healing over allies and tamed creatures
pw_ward_offering_mead_description: pour mead to the ward so its effect is carried to players in connected areas
pw_ward_offering_thunderstone_descriptio: offer a thunder stone to wake the storm and strike enemies in connected areas
pw_ward_offering_trophies_description: hang a trophy before the ward to hunt creatures of the same kind in connected areas
pw_ward_offering_bosstrophies_descriptio: offer a boss trophy to summon a Valkyrie path to the Sacrificial Stones; the trophy is not consumed
pw_ward_offering_ymirremains_description: place Ymir flesh at the ward and roots will quicken through every healthy plant in connected areas
pw_ward_offering_eitr_description: bind raw Eitr to the ward and plants will grow even where the land would normally refuse them
pw_ward_offering_dragonegg_description: offer a dragon egg after Moder has fallen to grant Moder's power to players in connected areas
pw_ward_offering_coins_description: pay the trader's price to call a Valkyrie path to Haldor
pw_ward_offering_hildirchest_description: return one of Hildir's chests to call a Valkyrie path to Hildir; the chest is not consumed
pw_ward_offering_hildiritem_description: offer the configured Hildir tribute to call a Valkyrie path to Hildir
pw_ward_offering_bogwitchitem_descriptio: offer the configured Bog Witch tribute to call a Valkyrie path to the Bog Witch
pw_permit_no_access: You do not have access to this ward.
pw_ward_expiration_expired: Ward protection expired due to inactivity
pw_ward_expiration_hint: An access player must interact with the ward to reactivate it.
pw_ward_offering_bossaltar_item_consumed: the item for the flight to the boss altar will be consumed
pw_ward_offerings_compendium_hint: Offering lore and the full list of known offerings are recorded in the Valheim Compendium, under the raven icon.
pw_ward_offerings_compendium_intro: The carved guardian answers more than a hand on old runes. Bring the right offering, and guarded ground may mend, grow, strike, or open a Valkyrie passage through the sky. Only offerings you can currently recognize are written here.
pw_ward_offerings_taxi_return: Valkyrie passage offerings will bring you back after your business is done. The return is shown by the Valkyrie passage status effect.
pw_ward_offerings_taxi_oneway: Valkyrie passage offerings are one-way journeys. The sky-road will not return you.
pw_tutorial_guardstone_extra: A ward can be more than a lock on doors. With the proper rites and settings, it can bind nearby wards into wider protected ground, watch over a homestead while its people are away, and answer offerings with mending, growth, storm, or a Valkyrie passage through the sky.
pw_se_return_back_to_ward_tooltip: The path back remains open. When this blessing fades, a Valkyrie will carry you back.
pw_se_ward_taxi_flight_tooltip: A Valkyrie carries you along the sky-road. Press $1 to let go; she will not pick you up again.
pw_se_ward_taxi_return_tooltip: The path back remains open. When this blessing fades, a Valkyrie will carry you back. Starting another passage cancels this return.
pw_se_ward_taxi_waiting_outbound_tooltip: The offering has been accepted. A Valkyrie will arrive soon.
pw_se_ward_taxi_waiting_retry_tooltip: Waiting for passage. The Valkyrie will come when you are ready to fly.
pw_se_ward_taxi_falling_tooltip: The Valkyrie has released you. Her blessing slows the fall until you touch land or water.
pw_msg_taxi_already_active: A Valkyrie passage is already active
